message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task (deterministic cache salt) only touches dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. Let me know what files you need so we can keep them disjoint.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task: add tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights() to grounded_proposer.py for weighted TIPS selection. If your feature also touches this file, let's coordinate on non-overlapping regions or I go first and you rebase.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this same file (mine: tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights() method touching __init__ and the set_tip_randomly branch; yours: deterministic cache salt, presumably elsewhere e.g. propose_instructions_for_predictor or wherever caching happens). Since it's one file, let's keep edits in disjoint regions/methods, each commit independently on our own branch, then merge via git (git merge) before final patch. Can you confirm which method(s)/lines your cache-salt change touches so we avoid the same lines?

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this file - can't fully disjoint by file, so let's split by region instead. My edits: (1) new method _cache_salt(self, pred_i, demo_set_i) added to GroundedProposer class, (2) inside propose_instruction_for_predictor(...): remove temperature/epsilon modulation lines, add 'cache_salt = self._cache_salt(pred_i=pred_i, demo_set_i=demo_set_i)' and pass cache_salt= kwarg to the instruction_generator(...) call, (3) GenerateModuleInstruction.forward(...): add cache_salt param passthrough to describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls, (4) generate_instruction_class(...) + DescribeProgram + DescribeModule signature classes: add a new 'cache_salt' InputField at the end of each. I will NOT touch tip selection/tip_weights logic. Please share the exact methods/lines your tip_weights change touches so we avoid the same lines; if there's overlap in propose_instruction_for_predictor's argument list or instruction_generator(...) call site, let's agree on final call signature together. I'll implement first and share my diff; you can rebase on top, or we merge via git and resolve conflicts manually.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Confirmed, regions look disjoint: yours=__init__ (tip_weights param) + set_tip_randomly branch/_select_tip_with_weights(); mine=new _cache_salt() method, temperature-modulation block inside propose_instruction_for_predictor (replaced with cache_salt compute + passthrough to instruction_generator call), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward cache_salt passthrough, and cache_salt InputField added to generate_instruction_class/DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signatures. Proceeding to implement now; will commit on agent1 branch and merge via git after. Ping me if instruction_generator(...) call site needs to carry both tip_weights and cache_salt kwargs together so we align the final signature.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Confirmed no overlap. My exact edits: (1) __init__ signature (lines ~272-288): add 'tip_weights: dict[str, float] | None = None' param and 'self.tip_weights = tip_weights' assignment near line 296-299 — right next to set_tip_randomly/set_history_randomly, not touching your rng= line. (2) In propose_instructions_for_program, only inside the 'if self.set_tip_randomly:' block (lines 361-371): replace the two lines that do rng.choice with a branch calling new self._select_tip_with_weights() when self.tip_weights else current rng.choice behavior. (3) New method _select_tip_with_weights(self) added near TIPS-related methods (won't touch propose_instruction_for_predictor, GenerateModuleInstruction, or the signature classes at all). Go ahead and implement/share your diff; I'll rebase on top or we git-merge after. Sounds good.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implemented and tested: tip_weights param in __init__, _select_tip_with_weights() helper (new method, placed right after __init__ before propose_instructions_for_program), and the branch inside 'if self.set_tip_randomly:' now dispatches to it when tip_weights is set. Existing tests pass (tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py). Committing on agent2 branch now. Let me know when your DONE is ready so we can merge.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implemented and committed: _cache_salt() method on GroundedProposer, removed temperature/epsilon modulation in propose_instruction_for_predictor, added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signatures, threaded cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward's 3 calls. Did not touch __init__ or set_tip_randomly/tip selection logic - that's all yours. Ready to merge whenever you're done; will pull team/agent2 and resolve any conflicts.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2 branch, resolved the single conflict (both new methods _select_tip_with_weights and _cache_salt landed side by side, no logic changes needed). All 4 tests in tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py pass post-merge. patch.txt regenerated against team/main and contains both our changes. Pushed agent2 branch. Thanks for the clean split!
